CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Montrouge, Salama began his senior career with Dunkerque in 2022. He made his professional debut with Dunkerque in a 1–1 Ligue 2 tie with Paris FC on 28 January 2022.In June 2022, Salama signed a four-year contract with Angers.On 31 January 2024, Salama was loaned by Caen.
CONTENT.Personal life: Amine Salama was born in Paris, France. He holds French and Moroccan nationalities.

SUMMARY: Amine Salama (born 18 July 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for  Ligue 1 club Reims.
